<p>QUETTA: Five coal miners were killed in two separate mine accidents that took place in the Bolan and Duki coalfield areas of Balochistan, while another miner was injured, officials said on Wednesday.</p>

news.headline: China beats expectations with 5% growth in first GDP release since Iran war
news.summary:
China’s economy grew 5 per cent year on year in the first quarter, beating market expectations despite the global impact of the US-Israel war in Iran, which analysts said indicates the country remains on track to meet its full-year growth target without the need for near-term stimulus.

news.headline: Fire at Australian refinery fuels petrol shortage fears amid global oil crisis
news.summary:
A fire at one of Australia’s two operating oil refineries could hit petrol production more than diesel and aviation fuel, authorities said on Thursday, as emergency crews worked overnight to extinguish the blaze.

news.headline: Israeli forces fire stun grenades at journalists in occupied Nablus
news.summary: Video shows Israeli forces firing stun grenades towards journalists who were reporting on the army’s raid of Nablus.

news.headline: Shakespeare Bought One Property in London. Now We Know Exactly Where.
news.summary: In confirming the precise location of William Shakespeare’s Blackfriars house, a British scholar raises fresh questions about what he intended to do with it.
